title: Symblon Theme Manifest
description: Per-theme overrides for symbol names and assets (themes/<name>/theme.yaml). Not used in themes/default/ — default asset filenames must match symbol IDs by convention.

symbols.description: Map of symbol ID to theme-specific overrides. Every symbol declared in agent.yaml must be present.

name.description: Theme-specific display name shown in the UI when this theme is active.

asset.description: SVG filename relative to this theme folder.
